series_metadata.series_title: Adjudicating Committee and Administrator’s Designee’s Internal Correspondence
series_metadata.series_description: The Adjudicating Committee and Administrator’s Designee’s Internal Correspondence is created by the Adjudicating Committee members in deliberation on a committee decision and /or any of these members correspondence or The Administrator’s Designee’s Correspondence (On second level hearings) with the Adjudicating Committee Secretary prior to issuing of an Adjudicating Order.
